name: SyncGD
description: Auto-syncs your save data across all devices with configurable intervals and integrated save retry functionality.

auto-save-interval.name: Auto-Save Interval
auto-save-interval.description: How often (in minutes) to automatically save your progress to the cloud

auto-load-on-startup.name: Auto-Load on Startup
auto-load-on-startup.description: Automatically check for and download cloud saves when starting the game

detect-changes.name: Detect Cloud Changes
detect-changes.description: Detect when your account has new progress on another device and prompt to sync

show-notifications.name: Show Notifications
show-notifications.description: Display notifications for sync operations (requires miskaa.notif)

save-retry-enabled.name: Save Retry
save-retry-enabled.description: Enable the integrated Save Retry functionality (replaces sorkopiko.saveretry)

max-retry-attempts.name: Max Retry Attempts
max-retry-attempts.description: Maximum number of retry attempts for failed saves (0 = unlimited)

show-retry-attempts.name: Show Retry Attempts
show-retry-attempts.description: Display the number of retry attempts in the Account menu

cancel-retry-button.name: Show Cancel Button
cancel-retry-button.description: Add a cancel button during retry attempts
